title: anthemis cretica subsp. pontica
intro: Anthemis cretica subsp. pontica, also known as Pontic Chamaemelum, is a subspecies of Anthemis cretica, a flowering plant in the daisy family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been attributed to its essential oils and flavonoids. The health benefits of Anthemis cretica subsp. pontica include its ability to soothe and calm the skin, reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, as well as its potential to alleviate anxiety and stress due to its calming effects. Herbal preparations of Anthemis cretica subsp. pontica include teas, infusions, and topical creams, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
